contentList.content:
You have spent your life in service to a temple, learning sacred rites and providing sacrifices to the god or gods you worship. Serving the gods and discovering their sacred works will guide you to greatness.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Religion, and you can recite a magical Prayer of Healing once per Short Rest.

You’re an expert in manipulation, prone to exaggeration and more than happy to profit from it. Bending the truth and turning allies against each other will lead to greater success down the road.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Deception, and you can Enthrall an enemy once per Short Rest.

You have a history of breaking the law and survive by leveraging less-than-legal connections. Profiting from criminal enterprise will lead to greater opportunities in the future.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Sleight of Hand, and you gain a +1 bonus to Initiative.

You live to sway and subvert your audience, engaging common crowds and high society alike. Preserving art and bringing joy to the hapless and downtrodden heightens your charismatic aura.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Performance, and you can cause magical Mischief once per Short Rest

You’re the champion of the common people, challenging tyrants and monsters to protect the helpless. Saving innocents in imminent danger will make your legend grow.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Perception, and your hit point maximum increases by 1 per level.

Your skill in a particular craft has earned you membership in a mercantile guild, offering privileges and protection while engaging in your art. Repairing and discovering rare crafts will bring new inspiration.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Medicine, and you can perform a Guiding Ceremony once per Short Rest.

You were raised in a family among the social elite, accustomed to power and privilege. Accumulating renown, power, and loyalty will raise your status.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Persuasion, and you can call on owed favours to receive a pack of supplies once per Long Rest.

You grew up in the wilds, learning to survive far from the comforts of civilization. Surviving unusual hazards of the wild will enhance your prowess and understanding.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Survival, and your Movement Speed is increased by 1.5 meters.

You’re curious and well-read, with an unending thirst for knowledge. Learning about rare lore of the world will inspire you to put this knowledge to greater purpose.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in History, and you may call upon repositories of borrowed knowledge once per Short Rest.

You are trained in battlefield tactics and combat, having served in a militia, mercenary company, or officer corps. Show smart tactics and bravery on the battlefield to enhance your prowess.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Athletics, and your Attack Rolls are increased by +1.

After surviving a poor and bleak childhood, you know how to make the most out of very little. Using your street smarts bolsters your spirit for the journey ahead.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Stealth, and you can rush into an Expeditious Retreat once per Short Rest.

A wicked moment, person, or thing that cannot be slain by sword or spell haunts your mind and flickers in your peripheral vision. You carry it wherever your adventure takes you - or perhaps it carries you.
Your experiences have granted you Proficiency in Intimidation, and when you are reduced to 0 hit points, you immediately regain hit points equal to your character level and are compelled to attack the creature that killed you for 3 turns or until it dies. You can use this feature once per Long Rest.

You have spent your life in service to a temple, learning sacred rites and providing sacrifices to the god or gods you worship. Serving the gods and discovering their sacred works will guide you to greatness.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Religion">Religion</LSTag>.

You’re an expert in manipulation, prone to exaggeration and more than happy to profit from it. Bending the truth and turning allies against each other will lead to greater success down the road.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Deception">Deception</LSTag>.

You have a history of breaking the law and survive by leveraging less-than-legal connections. Profiting from criminal enterprise will lead to greater opportunities in the future.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="SleightOfHand">Sleight of Hand</LSTag>.

You live to sway and subvert your audience, engaging common crowds and high society alike. Preserving art and bringing joy to the hapless and downtrodden heightens your charismatic aura.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Performance">Performance</LSTag>.

You’re the champion of the common people, challenging tyrants and monsters to protect the helpless. Saving innocents in imminent danger will make your legend grow.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Perception">Perception</LSTag>.

Your skill in a particular craft has earned you membership in a mercantile guild, offering privileges and protection while engaging in your art. Repairing and discovering rare crafts will bring new inspiration.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Medicine">Medicine</LSTag>.

You were raised in a family among the social elite, accustomed to power and privilege. Accumulating renown, power, and loyalty will raise your status.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Persuasion">Persuasion</LSTag>.

You grew up in the wilds, learning to survive far from the comforts of civilization. Surviving unusual hazards of the wild will enhance your prowess and understanding.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Survival">Survival</LSTag>.

You’re curious and well-read, with an unending thirst for knowledge. Learning about rare lore of the world will inspire you to put this knowledge to greater purpose.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="History">History</LSTag>.

You are trained in battlefield tactics and combat, having served in a militia, mercenary company, or officer corps. Show smart tactics and bravery on the battlefield to enhance your prowess.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Athletics">Athletics</LSTag>.

After surviving a poor and bleak childhood, you know how to make the most out of very little. Using your street smarts bolsters your spirit for the journey ahead.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Stealth">Stealth</LSTag>.

A wicked moment, person, or thing that cannot be slain by sword or spell haunts your mind and flickers in your peripheral vision. You carry it wherever your adventure takes you - or perhaps it carries you.
Your experiences have granted you <LSTag Tooltip="Proficiency">Proficiency</LSTag> in <LSTag Tooltip="Intimidation">Intimidation</LSTag>.
Background: Acolyte
You may cast a <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_LHB_IB_PrayerOfHealing">Prayer of Healing</LSTag> once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Background: Charlatan
You may <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_LHB_IB_Enthrall">Enthrall</LSTag> an enemy once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Background: Criminal
You gain a +1 bonus to Initiative Rolls.
Background: Entertainer
You may cast a <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_LHB_IB_NathairsMischief">Mischief</LSTag> spell once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Background: Folk Hero
Your <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit point</LSTag> maximum increases by 1 per level.
Background: Guild Artisan
You may perform a <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_LHB_IB_GuidingCeremony">Guiding Ceremony</LSTag> once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Background: Noble
You may summon a <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_LHB_IB_HeroesFeast">Gentleman's Feast</LSTag> once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Background: Outlander
You gain 1.5 meters (5 feet) extra <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">Movement Speed</LSTag>.
Background: Sage
You may <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Target_LHB_IB_BorrowedKnowledge">Recall Knowledge</LSTag> once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Background: Soldier
The number you need to <LSTag Tooltip="AttackRoll">roll</LSTag> a <LSTag Tooltip="CriticalHit">Critical Hit</LSTag> while attacking is reduced by 1.
Background: Urchin
You may start a <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="Shout_LHB_IB_ExpeditiousRetreat">Expeditious Retreat</LSTag> once per <LSTag Tooltip="ShortRest">Short Rest</LSTag>.
Background: Haunted One
When you are reduced to 0 <LSTag Tooltip="HitPoints">hit points</LSTag>, you immediately regain [1] and are compelled to attack the creature that killed you for 3 turns or until it dies.
Acolyte: Prayer of Healing
Outside of combat, heal all allies within [1].
Charlatan: Enthrall

Cloud a creature's better judgement, forcing them to ignore their peripheral vision.

This ability will not break Stealth.
Entertainer: Mischief

Afflict a creature with chaotic magic, causing them to experience a sudden surge of <LSTag Type="Passive" Tooltip="WildMagic">Wild Magic</LSTag>. Wild Magic caused by this Spell is truly random, and can be both positive or negative.
Entertainer's Mischief
Guild Artisan: Guiding Ceremony
Grant yourself and all allies within [1] a +1d4 bonus to <LSTag Tooltip="AbilityCheck">Ability Checks</LSTag>.
Noble: Gentleman's Feast
Summon a container filled to the brim with <LSTag Tooltip="CampSupplies">Camp Supplies</LSTag>.
Sage: Recall Knowledge
Draw on knowledge from your studies to grant yourself or another allied creature <LSTag Tooltip="Advantage">Advantage</LSTag> on <LSTag Tooltip="SkillCheck">Skill Checks</LSTag>.
Recalled Knowledge
Urchin: Expeditious Retreat

Grant a creature the effects of <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DASH">Dash</LSTag> and <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="DISENGAGE">Disengage</LSTag> for three turns. This ability will not break <LSTag Type="Status" Tooltip="SNEAKING">Stealth</LSTag>.
